scheme_name: PMMSY: Establishment of small RAS /Biofloc culture system - Haryana
page_title: PMMSY: Establishment of small RAS /Biofloc culture system - Haryana

details: The Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana: Establishment of small RAS / Biofloc Culture System, introduced by the Ministry Of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry & Dairying, Government of India, aims to provide financial assistance for establishing small-scale aquaculture units, either through 1 RAS tank (100 m³ capacity) or 7 Biofloc tanks (4 m diameter × 1.5 m height). It aims to promote sustainable and scientific fish farming for individual farmers with smaller land or capital access. It is a centrally funded scheme with a 50:50 cost-sharing pattern between the Central and State Governments.
benefits: A 40% subsidy is available for the General Category.
A 60% subsidy is offered for SC (Scheduled Caste) and Women beneficiaries.
eligibility: The applicant must be a permanent resident of Haryana and possess a valid Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP).
The applicant must own land or have a registered lease of at least 10 years, free from legal encumbrances.
The applicant must have access to a water source such as a canal, well, tube well, or similar.
The applicant must be trained in aquaculture or fisheries and hold a valid certification.
The applicant must be willing to maintain and operate the system at their own cost post-installation.
The applicant must submit a Detailed Project Report (DPR) or a Self-Contained Proposal (SCP).
The applicant must sign an agreement with the Fisheries Department to be eligible under the scheme.

online: For registration, click on “New User/Register Here” and fill in all the mandatory details i.e. Name, Email ID, Mobile Number & password. Click on ‘Submit’.
Verify the OTP received in the provided Email and Mobile Number. Alternatively, click on the Verification Link to activate the profile.
Login to Apply for the Scheme:
The “Sign in here” option is available on the right side of the screen. Fill in the required credentials and click on the ‘Login’ button.
In the opened window, click on “Scheme/Services list”, and a list of schemes will appear on the screen.
Now, select the scheme and click on “Apply for Service/Scheme”.
Fill in all the details in the online application form and click on "Submit".
Type SARAL and send to 9954699899 to track your application.
Type SARAL<space><Application ID/Ticket No.> and send to 9954699899 to track your application/ticket.

documents_required: Date of Birth Proof (Aadhaar, Voter ID, Birth Certificate, Matric Certificate).
Land Records (Jamabandi/Farad or 10-year registered lease deed).
Bank Account Details and PAN Card.
DPR or SCP (as per PMMSY guidelines).

faqs.question: How much subsidy will I get if I belong to the General Category?
faqs.answer: As a General Category applicant, you will receive a 40% subsidy on the total project cost.

faqs.question: If I am a woman or belong to the SC category, what subsidy am I eligible for?
faqs.answer: You are eligible for a 60% subsidy on the project cost if you are a woman or from the SC category.

faqs.question: Is having a Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP) mandatory to apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is compulsory to have a valid Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP) to apply for this scheme.

faqs.question: What land documents do I need to submit along with my application?
faqs.answer: You need to provide Jamabandi, Nakal Akshizra, Farad, or a registered lease deed with a minimum 10-year duration.

faqs.question: Is borewell water allowed as a water source for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Yes, water from open wells, tube wells, borewells, canals, rivers, and springs is allowed.

faqs.question: Will the government take care of maintenance after the construction is completed?
faqs.answer: No, you will be responsible for the operation, management, and maintenance of the unit at your own cost.

faqs.question: What specific infrastructure is required to be set up under this scheme?
faqs.answer: The infrastructure must include essential elements required for RAS or Biofloc, including water treatment units.

faqs.question: Am I required to submit a Detailed Project Report during application?
faqs.answer: Yes, you need to submit a Detailed Project Report (DPR) or Self Contained Proposal (SCP) as per PMMSY guidelines.

faqs.question: Can I apply online or do I have to visit an office?
faqs.answer: The document does not specify application mode, but support is available via saral.haryana@gov.in and 0172-3968400. saral.haryana@gov.in

faqs.question: Is this scheme open to first-time applicants or only experienced ones?
faqs.answer: The scheme does not restrict first-time applicants, but a training certificate is mandatory.
